core_model.structure_summary: A system of coupled first-order autonomous ODEs in which mass flows irreversibly between labeled compartments, with the transfer rate given by a bilinear product of two state variables plus a linear removal term.
core_model.canonical_form: \dot{x}_1 = -\alpha_1 x_1 y,\quad \dot{x}_2 = -\alpha_2 x_2 y,\quad \dot{y} = (\alpha_1 x_1 + \alpha_2 x_2)\,y - \gamma y,\quad \dot{z} = \gamma y

variables.meaning: compartment occupancies whose total is conserved
bilinear transfer rate coefficients and linear removal rate
time-dependent modulation of a transfer coefficient (scenario switching)

deterministic_skeleton.summary: First-order autonomous ODE system with bilinear cross-coupling between state variables and a linear decay term, conserving the total of all states.

notes: No display equations were extracted; identification of the compartmental bilinear ODE structure rests on the title/abstract (differential system, later discretised as an integrator). The discrete-time version is a numerical tool, not the core object, so the core is taken as the continuous ODE. A time-varying control on the transfer coefficient represents the confinement strategies.
